title: Gilbergd
compiled_truth: Gilbergd is an external contact at [Sullcrom](companies/sullcrom). Over the corpus period (1999-05-20 to 2002-01-04), Gilbergd sent 29 and received 124 emails, totalling 153 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (29), [Raislerk](people/raislerk-sullcrom) (12), [Lkitchen](people/lkitchen-enron) (5), [Psimons](people/psimons-enron) (3), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (3).
